subject: Screen recording permission missing for conferencing app
description: User cannot share screen in video app; macOS says screen recording not allowed.

ts_steps.title: Screen Recording toggle
ts_steps.action: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Screen Recording — enable app.

ts_steps.title: Add app if missing
ts_steps.action: Use + to add from Applications if list empty; launch app once to prompt.

ts_steps.title: Quit app fully
ts_steps.action: Cmd+Q conferencing app; relaunch; retry share.

ts_steps.title: Accessibility
ts_steps.action: Privacy & Security → Accessibility — add same app if control features required.

ts_steps.title: Microphone and Camera
ts_steps.action: While in Privacy settings, confirm Mic/Camera for same app.

ts_steps.title: Remove stale entries
ts_steps.action: Delete gray duplicate app paths from lists; re-add current binary.

ts_steps.title: Window vs display share
ts_steps.action: In meeting choose single window first to test TCC path.

ts_steps.title: Restart Mac
ts_steps.action: Some macOS builds cache TCC until reboot.

ts_steps.title: Reinstall client
ts_steps.action: Delete app and prefs per policy; reinstall latest Apple Silicon build.

ts_steps.title: MDM
ts_steps.action: If toggles grayed, policy blocks — escalate.

internal_information: TCC lists; MDM lock; duplicate paths. Apple Silicon only.
